markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on project progress, staffing, and key decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Staffing Change:** Katya Luscomb is now the GrowthX project lead, replacing Matthew Panzarino.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**Multi-Product Strategy:** A data audit confirmed that only \~9% of companies have 3+ products. These will be handled manually in the CMS, while the rest automate via API.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Tagging Simplification:** The proposed taxonomy is too complex. Will Watters will simplify it to a core `Industry` + `Pricing Model` structure to improve user navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Page Review:** Will Watters will review all sample pages to align content with Metronome's brand voice ("R speak") and provide consistent structural feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

## Topics

### Staffing & Introductions

  - [Katya Luscomb is the new GrowthX project lead, replacing Matthew Panzarino, who is moving to other roles.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Katya has been fully briefed and will ensure a seamless transition.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

### Multi-Product Company Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The standard pricing table template doesn't support companies with 3+ products, which require custom table structures.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Solution:** A data audit of \~100 companies confirmed this is a low-volume issue, making a custom approach feasible.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**Findings:** 1-product (79%), 2-product (12%), 3-product (9), 4+ product (2).](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
      - [**Decision:** Automate 1-2 product companies via API. Manually build custom tables for 3+ product companies in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Workflow:** GrowthX will create a separate "problem companies" tab in Airtable to flag these for manual handling.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Tagging Taxonomy Simplification

  - [**Problem:** The initial taxonomy is overly complex, with too many granular tags (e.g., "action-based pricing," "agent time-based pricing").](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Solution:** Simplify the tagging structure to improve user navigation and reduce complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [**Core Structure:** `Industry` (e.g., "Image Generation") + `Pricing Model` (e.g., "Output-Based").](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This combination provides sufficient filtering power for the initial launch. More granular tags can be added later if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### Page Content & Structure Review

  - [**Status:** Will Watters has started reviewing sample pages and will complete the full review in the next few days.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Feedback Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Content:** Align all copy with Metronome's brand voice ("R speak").](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [**Structure:** Provide consistent feedback on page layout.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX will use this feedback to refine the page template and content guidelines, ensuring future pages are aligned from the start.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Will Watters:**](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Simplify the tagging taxonomy and share the revised structure with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Complete the full review of all sample pages and provide detailed feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [Create the "problem companies" tab in Airtable to flag manual builds.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [Implement feedback from the page review to refine the template and guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/yXhysQiyw1gGtJrdxJvqhG8upJsHwY_X?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
